original_prompt: 给这个和田玉手串做一张淘宝主图，要求多添加一点元素充实画面
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce [Jewelry & Accessories] scene, [Premium Zen] commercial photography style. [A minimalist, circular beaded bracelet composed of uniformly sized, polished spherical beads of pale milky celadon green] is placed at [Center].
[Props]: Surrounded by [natural smooth river stones], [delicate ginkgo leaves], and [flowing water ripples] (enhancing value).
[Background]: [Clean light beige textured stone surface with soft dappled sunlight shadows].
Lighting is [Studio Softbox with warm accent light], ensuring product details are sharp.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “温润如玉”. Position: [Top Right Negative Space]. Style: [3D Bold Serif with gold texture]. Color: [Dark Emerald Green].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “和田青白玉手串”. Style: [Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “甄选源头好料”. Style: [Premium UI, e.g. 'Frosted Glass Bar' with gold border].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “国检证书”. Style: [Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim].
layout_logic: Considering the pale green color of the jade, a warm beige or light grey background will create a gentle contrast. Placing the product on a natural stone prop elevates the 'natural' aspect. Text should be placed in the top right or left empty space to avoid covering the product. Using a serif font (宋体/楷体) reinforces the cultural/traditional value of the jade.
